title: Allow negations / extended conditions in Automations
excerpt:
Hi monday.com Team 
It would be very handy to be able to use negations / extended conditions in Automations. 
Example: 
“When a Person is assigned” / “When a Person is NOT assigned” 
When a Person is assigned and only if…

posts.author: ll4mat (Knecht Rootrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com Team

It would be very handy to be able to use negations / extended conditions in Automations.

Example:

“When a Person is assigned” / “When a Person is NOT assigned”
When a Person is assigned and only if Person is assigned to…" / When a Person is assigned and only if Person is NOT assigned to…"

This would make the automations much more powerful in one fell swoop.
Also it would allow to create automations that move an item if, for example, a certain person (me) is no longer assigned as owner or co-owner. For example, in a corresponding group such as ‘Delegated / Assigned to others’.
